summary: formation pass routed both oversized nodes to breadth and refuted the prior cluster read: the decision graph showed driving separate from lookup and placement smaller than a section-size read had suggested, making it a five-way split rather than four

relocated both suites into seven unit specs; verified independently of the producers against title sets hashed before any file moved, with every step and example line compared as a multiset in both capabilities

repointed a stale source comment at the unit a scenario's subject implied rather than at the unit that actually holds it; caught by grepping for the scenario text before committing, and corrected to the real owner
